name: listingbureau-mcp
description: Amazon organic ranking MCP server. Run ranking campaigns, track keyword positions, and monitor rank movement.

LB_API_KEY.title: API Key
LB_API_KEY.description: Your Listing Bureau API key. Get it at https://listingbureau.com/auth/dashboard

tools.name: lb_projects_list
tools.description: List Amazon projects with optional filters

tools.name: lb_projects_create
tools.description: Create a new Amazon project (ASIN + keyword)

tools.name: lb_projects_get
tools.description: Get detailed project info including schedule and SERP data

tools.name: lb_projects_update
tools.description: Update project settings (pause/resume)

tools.name: lb_projects_archive
tools.description: Archive (soft delete) a project

tools.name: lb_projects_get_stats
tools.description: Get daily stats: rankings, service execution, analytics

tools.name: lb_schedule_get
tools.description: Get current per-day schedule for a project

tools.name: lb_schedule_set
tools.description: Set full per-day schedule (replaces existing)

tools.name: lb_schedule_quick_set
tools.description: Quick-set uniform daily volumes for a project

tools.name: lb_estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate campaign cost, daily averages, and wallet sustainability

tools.name: lb_wallet_get_balance
tools.description: Get wallet balance (credits and USD)

tools.name: lb_wallet_get_transactions
tools.description: Get wallet transaction history (paginated)

tools.name: lb_wallet_topup
tools.description: Generate a Stripe checkout URL to top up wallet

tools.name: lb_orders_list
tools.description: List orders (paginated, newest first)

tools.name: lb_orders_get
tools.description: Get detailed info for a specific order

tools.name: lb_orders_report_issue
tools.description: Report an issue with an order

tools.name: lb_account_get
tools.description: Get account info (email, name, status, balance)

tools.name: lb_account_update_profile
tools.description: Update account profile fields

tools.name: lb_account_get_service_rates
tools.description: Get current service pricing rates

tools.name: lb_account_get_subscription
tools.description: Get subscription info (plan, fee, wallet usage)

tools.name: lb_feedback_submit
tools.description: Submit feedback, feature requests, or suggestions (10-5000 characters)
